Threat_Description: Selling Android banking malware targeting SBI customers in Bhopal. Malware steals OTPs and credentials.
Leaked employee credentials of IIITDM Jabalpur available for sale.
Fraudulent investment platform targeting Indore citizens through social media.
Selling fake Aadhaar and PAN card generation services for Jabalpur residents.
Ransomware campaign targeting AIIMS Bhopal hospital network.
Phishing emails impersonating Collector Office Indore asking users to update KYC.
Recruiting mule bank accounts for laundering cyber fraud money in Gwalior.
Android APK impersonating PhonePe and Google Pay targeting Ujjain users.
Sensitive citizen database allegedly stolen from municipal records.
Selling fake cryptocurrency investment opportunities targeting students.
